root_cause: A production config change disabled the catalog hot cache path, driving cache misses and Redis timeout-induced latency in catalog-api.
supporting_evidence: Latency spikes begin immediately after the hot cache flag change.
Cache miss ratio rises above 90 percent while traffic stays normal.
Logs show Redis timeout pressure instead of downstream database failures.
acceptable_remediations: Restore the hot cache configuration or roll back the cache-related config change.
Validate cache hit ratio and catalog latency after the rollback.
Add configuration guards and synthetic checks for cache-path disabling in production.
required_reasoning_steps: Correlate the latency increase with the cache flag rollout.
Use the cache miss and timeout evidence to reject unrelated traffic explanations.
Recommend restoring the cache path before tuning unrelated dependencies.
